title: AI & Software Engineering Consultant
description: Long-term technical consultant for B2B companies in pharma, SaaS, and digital automation, leading development and architecture of enterprise platforms
Designs and ships AI-driven systems including multi-agent chatbots, RAG platforms, NLP classifiers, and document AI for client production environments
Lead engineer on a multi-agent news chatbot reaching 8M+ monthly readers via a major Italian news outlet
Builds with Python, TypeScript, LlamaIndex/LangChain, AWS Bedrock, GCP, and modern agentic frameworks
Works closely with product owners and engineering teams to align technical roadmap with business priorities

title: Software Engineer & ICT Analyst
description: Led software development for web and mobile platforms used by millions of users
Developed and deployed a BERT-based NLP model for GDPR compliance: 85% accuracy, 90% reduction in manual review time
Led the migration of the data warehouse from Oracle to PostgreSQL with full ETL rewrite on Apache Airflow: 100% cost reduction, 20% query performance improvement
Built ML-based prioritization and anomaly detection systems integrated into B2B platforms
Implemented CI/CD pipelines, automated testing (Playwright), and observability (Grafana, OpenTelemetry)
Migrated Xamarin Forms mobile app to .NET MAUI, established Git-based version control across teams

title: AWS Cloud Developer Associate Trainer
description: Delivered AWS Cloud Developer Associate certification training programs to corporate clients
External engagement parallel to consulting work — not a primary activity but signals depth of AWS practitioner experience
